ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament (e.g., World Cup, Olympics) */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport of the tournament (e.g., Ice Hockey, Basketball) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the tournament is held */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., national, international, club) */,
  "tournament_format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., round-robin, knockout, group stage) */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "runner_up_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner-up team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Chetwynd Rec Centre) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the game belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team or country */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the tournament (e.g., Preliminary, Final) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., W, 6-0, OTW, 5-4) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the game is held */,
  "broadcast_type" TEXT /* Type of broadcast or streaming (e.g., Live Stream, No Stream) */,
  "us_player_of_game" TEXT /* U.S. Player of the Game (if any) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "game_length" INTEGER /* Length of the game in minutes */,
  "ot" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime (yes/no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Canada East, Czech Republic) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Goalkeeper) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_players" (
  "game_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-player record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the game */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties received by the player in the game */,
  "player_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the player in the game */,
  "player_minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_players_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broadcasters" (
  "broadcaster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broadcaster */,
  "broadcaster_name" TEXT /* Name of the broadcaster (e.g., ESPN, CBC) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the broadcaster */,
  "broadcaster_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the broadcaster */,
  "broadcaster_address" TEXT /* Address of the broadcaster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broadcaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_broadcasts" (
  "game_broadcast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game broadcast record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "broadcaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broadcaster */,
  "broadcast_type" TEXT /* Type of broadcast (e.g., Live Stream, No Stream) */,
  "broadcast_link" TEXT /* Link to the broadcast or stream */,
  "broadcast_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the broadcast (e.g., HD, SD) */,
  "broadcast_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the broadcast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_broadcast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_broadcasts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_broadcasts_broadcaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("broadcaster_id") REFERENCES broadcasters ("broadcaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, team manager, media) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament accessed */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accessed_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)
